summary: Comprehensive blueprint for the Singapore Smart City project covering 5 phases: (0) model fine-tuning on cloud, (1) dataset collection, (2) dataset formatting for Kaggle, (3) failure analytics, (4) model drift detection. All compute runs on Google Colab or Vast.ai — nothing local. Includes verified API statuses, compute platform comparison, training strategies with expected tweaking needs, and the full Kaggle publishing plan. Designed as a reference document, not for immediate execution.
